method: paired mean (sampler - merged) over n=118 common val pairs; bf16-merge inference-path calibration artifact
note: Corrects threshold-based judge uses (confusion verdicts, absolute pass/fail cutoffs) and the Phase-8 reward 30% wp_judge component (D-V4-09 / D-11); does NOT affect rank metrics (REVL-01A Spearman). Under MO-GRPO within-group normalization a uniform offset largely cancels; apply for absolute-threshold consistency. Recalibration equivalent: apply policy cutoff at (policy_threshold - 3.58) on raw merged-endpoint scores, OR add 3.58 to scores before applying the original policy threshold.
recalibrated_threshold_note: 66.42 = policy 70.0 - 3.58 offset; applying this threshold to raw merged-endpoint scores is equivalent to applying the policy-70 threshold to recalibrated (+3.58) scores
phase_8_inheritance: Phase-8 planning MUST consume this artifact. The 30% frozen wp_judge reward component (D-11) should apply this +3.58 offset (or equivalently use threshold 66.42) to maintain consistency between gate-time and RL-reward-time judge calibration.
